name: 8q24_3_RECQL4_subtelomeric_SD
description: 8q24.3 distal region containing RECQL4 (Rothmund-Thomson syndrome) with telomere-adjacent SDs and the 8q telomere. Rare microdeletions encompassing RECQL4 reported.

architecture.internal_structure: Small subtelomeric SD blocks adjacent to RECQL4; modest paralog content.
